[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000001 1
1 00000100 1
2 10111101 6
3 10010111 5
4 00010110 3
5 01110011 5
6 10100001 3
7 11110111 7

67 76 00000001 1 match 0
70 07 00000000 a
